languages.text: {n}Сложно поспорить с простой истиной: человек, с которого писали картину, был чрезвычайно хорош собой. Ни один тщательно прорисованный шрам, которыми Вольный Торговец отмечен словно медалями за воинскую доблесть, не смог испортить его благородную красоту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Сложно оспорить простую истину: человек, с которого писали картину, был чрезвычайно хорош собой. Художник изобразил его в момент покоя, но широкие жесты и твердый взгляд говорят о том, что такие минуты были для столь выдающейся личности редкостью.{/n}

languages.text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сложно поспорить с простой истиной: человек, с которого писали картину, был чрезвычайно хорош собой. Ни один тщательно прорисованный шрам, которыми Вольный Торговец отмечен словно медалями за воинскую доблесть, не смог испортить его благородную красоту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

{n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

{n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

languages.text: {n}反論の余地のない単純な事実だ——この肖像の人物は、きわめて見目麗しい。ローグ・トレーダーである彼が武勲章のように誇りをもって身に帯びていた、精緻に描き込まれた傷跡のどれひとつとして、その高貴な美貌を損なってはいない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}反論の余地のない単純な事実だ——この肖像の人物は、きわめて見目麗しい。ローグ・トレーダーである彼が武勲章のように誇りをもって身に帯びていた、精緻に描き込まれた傷跡のどれひとつとして、その高貴な美貌を損なってはいない。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le sujet du portrait était un homme très séduisant, c'est un fait qu'il serait bien difficile de nier. Même ses cicatrices, que le libre-marchand portait comme des médailles de valeur militaire et que l'artiste a méticuleusement reproduites, ne ternissaient en rien sa noble beauté.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sujet du portrait était un homme très séduisant, c'est un fait qu'il serait bien difficile de nier. Même ses cicatrices, que le libre-marchand portait comme des médailles de valeur militaire et que l'artiste a méticuleusement reproduites, ne ternissaient en rien sa noble beauté.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gerçek gayet ortada: Portrenin öznesi, son derece yakışıklı bir bireymiş. Hür Tacir'in askerî cesaret madalyaları gibi taşıdığı titizlikle resmedilmiş yara izlerinin hiçbiri, soylu güzelliğini bozamazmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Gerçek gayet ortada: Portrenin öznesi, son derece yakışıklı bir bireymiş. Hür Tacir'in askerî cesaret madalyaları gibi taşıdığı titizlikle resmedilmiş yara izlerinin hiçbiri, soylu güzelliğini bozamazmış.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eines steht fest. Der Mann auf dem Porträt war ein ausgesprochen attraktiver Zeitgenosse. Keine seiner akribisch gemalten Narben, die der Freihändler wie Orden für Tapferkeit im Kampf trug, schmälert seine edle Schönheit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eines steht fest. Der Mann auf dem Porträt war ein ausgesprochen attraktiver Zeitgenosse. Keine seiner akribisch gemalten Narben, die der Freihändler wie Orden für Tapferkeit im Kampf trug, schmälert seine edle Schönheit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es difícil negar los hechos: el hombre del cuadro era extremadamente atractivo. Ninguna de sus cicatrices, pintadas con meticuloso detalle y tratadas como medallas al valor, merma su noble belleza.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es difícil negar los hechos: el hombre del cuadro era extremadamente atractivo. Ninguna de sus cicatrices, pintadas con meticuloso detalle y tratadas como medallas al valor, merma su noble belleza.{/n}

languages.text: {n}有一点毋庸置疑：肖像中的这位行商浪人相貌极其英俊。即便是疤痕，也丝毫未损其高贵的美貌，反而像勇毅勋章般被他精心地展示着。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is hard to argue with the simple truth: the subject of the portrait was an extremely good-looking individual. Not one of his meticulously painted scars, which the Rogue Trader bore like medals for military valour, could spoil his noble beauty.{/n}
